blocked_by_gate_questions.question: Read public marketplace/category pages to compare demand signals, saturation, price bands, and buyer language.
Review seller terms, tax/KYC/payment setup, refund obligations, and platform fees.
Create, publish, update, or promote a marketplace listing or public product page.
Create seller accounts, connect payouts, accept agreements, or configure payment settings.

forbidden_actions: Do not distribute, publish, browse marketplaces, create seller accounts, accept terms, configure payouts, set prices, or claim live demand from these package files.
Do not mutate service requests, assign/start workers, call APIs, touch wallets/payments, trade, submit, post, or create external side effects from these package files.
next_action: Run a local package completeness check across all six manifest files; do not distribute, list, price, browse marketplaces, create accounts, or configure payouts.

qa_rows.check: All internal references point to files present in the local manifest.
No revenue, conversion, payout, buyer-count, or live-demand claim is present.
README says the pack is a planning aid, not legal/tax/payment/marketplace advice.
Every promised screenshot has a shot-list row before packaging.
Launch checklist contains owner, status, due, and evidence columns before packaging.
Marketplace browsing, seller terms, public listing, and payout setup are visibly gated.
No distribution, listing, upload, price, or payment action has been performed.

readme_sections.content: A local draft pack for solo AI builders organizing launch positioning, screenshots, QA, and review.
Solo AI builders and operators preparing a small product launch without a launch manager or agency.
README, positioning template, launch checklist, screenshot shot list, QA pass, and post-launch review worksheet.
Fill the positioning template, complete the checklist, prepare screenshots, run the QA pass, and save review notes.
This is not legal, tax, payment, marketplace, pricing, launch agency, or revenue guidance.
No revenue, conversion, buyer-count, demand, payout, or marketplace-validation claim is made.
Live marketplace research, seller terms, public listings, accounts, payouts, and payment setup require explicit approval gates.

review_prompts.prompt: What traffic or attention source was used after an approved launch?
What replies, objections, questions, or support requests appeared?
What non-sensitive conversion signal can be recorded without exposing private data?
What support burden did the pack create?
What exact buyer language should shape the next revision?
What should be changed, killed, or validated next?

screenshot_rows.caption: Show what the builder is launching in one glance.
Show how a new user reaches value without confusion.
Show the practical difference the product creates.
Only draft locally; real pricing and public listing are gated.
Use local sample proof, not buyer-count or revenue claims.
Pre-answer common setup and misuse questions.

summary: Drafted four remaining local package files for the AI builder launch checklist pack: README, screenshot shot list, QA pass, and post-launch review. The draft remains private and local, with marketplace validation, distribution, accounts, pricing, and payouts gated.
